name: Spiking Daemon
description: Daemons with spike frequency adaptation (ON/OFF cycling). Shows the 'lava lamp' effect: daemons birth, migrate, and die. Dynamism without organization.

config.description: Spike frequency adaptation forces ON/OFF cycling. After up_ticks active steps, neurons enter refractory for down_ticks steps. Creates beautiful dynamic patterns but does NOT produce topological organization alone.
